non_blocking: PlayerScreen imports Audio from expo-av but the spec mentioned adding a soundRef = useRef<Audio.Sound | null>(null) inside the component; the implementation omits the ref and uses a plain local variable inside the async closure instead. Functionally equivalent for the current use case, but deviates from the spec's stated approach.

The STEP_LABELS array type annotation uses the shorthand Array<{ ko: string; en: string }> in the spec but the implementation uses { ko: string; en: string }[] — both are valid TypeScript, purely a style difference.
